title: Infused Potatoes
description: Craft new potatoes, unlock magical abilitys, and fight with unholy powers!

# Installation Steps
<details>
<summary>Installation Steps</summary>

**Mod**  
- Download the mod version of the project.  
- Place the downloaded file in the `mods` folder of your Minecraft instance.  

**Datapack**  
- The datapack version is a single file that works as a “2-in-1.”  
- You can install this one file in **both** your `datapacks` folder **and** your `resourcepacks` folder.

</details>


# Description

> Infused Potatoes is a Minecraft datapack (also a mod) that **introduces several new potatoes into your game,** offering a variety of new ways to fight in epic combat or flee the most daring escapes. From striking your enemies with lightning with the **Holy Potato,** or blasting your enemies into the sky with the **Lush Potato,** this datapack guarantees a new and unique twist to your **singleplayer **or** multiplayer** experience! 

# Features


<details>
<summary>Infused Potato</summary>



> The Infused potato is said to be able to be farmed because a rare surge in nature occours.
> The potato seems to be infused with leaves, and cherry vines, almost like its still apart of
> the earth..

- The Infused Potato is the main crafting ingredient for all other Infused Potatoes.
  
- It has no Passive Effects or Abilities
  
- The Infused Potato can be farmed from basic potatoes and has a pretty low percentage of  
  dropping to ensure a power balance to some Infused Potatoes, as they can sometimes 
  be very strong.
</details>


## Types Of Infused Potatoes
> These potatoes are **Sub Potatoes**, crafted from the main infused potato. Sub Potatoes have special abilitys when consumed. 

Some Sub Potatoes are not activated by consuming them. Potatoes, like the lush potato, are activated by right clicking the potato. 
> 




<details>
<summary>Holy Potato</summary>
 
> The Holy Potato is said to be a divine gift to those with the purest of hearts, and kindest   
of souls. The Potato seems to be _infused_ with glowing yellow streaks of energy, encasing the potato's outer skin.
 
 ### Passive Effects
 - Regeneration II (10 Seconds)
 - Speed II (15 Seconds)
 - Instant Health I

 ### Ability
- Form a shockwave of clouds and strike **nearby enemies with lightning,** poisoning them with 
  **slowness II and weakness II for 10 seconds.**

### Crafting Recipe

![holy](https://i.postimg.cc/WbdcX88M/holy-potato-crafting.png)
  
- Infused Potato 1
- Honey Comb 3
- Ghast Tear 1
- Gold Ingot 4



</details>


<details>
<summary>Corrupt Potato</summary>

> The Corrupt potato has a long history of _bringing chaos and destruction wherever it's used._ Legend says that when consumed, the consumer is therefore filled with malice, hatred, and insanity for the rest of their days.

### Passive Effects
- Strengh II (10s)
- Resistance (10s)
- Instant Health I
  
### Ability
When consumed, summon ancient malice from the depths **and entrap nearby entities for 7 seconds.**
_(there are ways to escape the malice..)_

### Crafting Recipe
![corrupt](https://i.postimg.cc/QMdSSPPg/corrupt-potato-recipe.png)


- Ghast Tear 1
- Amethyst 2
- Magma Cream 2
- Infused Potato 1
- Fermented Spider Eye 2
- Glistening Melon Slice 1

</details>



<details>
<summary>Lush Potato</summary>

> The Lush potato has said to be around, longer than any other Infused Potato.. growing in power, feeding off of the energy of the world.. _gentely consuming forever._

### Passive Effects
- None

### Ability
- When Consumed, **shoot an azalea leaf in front of you that carries nearby entities**
  along with it._(A great tool to push away entities)_
 **Note:** The crafting recipe gives 8 potatoes, and use your ```Use Item/Place Block``` keybind to shoot an azalia leaf at an entity.

### Recipe
![lush](https://i.postimg.cc/PqrBvpGH/lush-potato-recipe.png)
- Cactus Flower 2
- Amethyst Shard
- Glow Berry 2
- Moss Block 3
- Infused Potato



</details>
